title: Return no-change instead of inventing motivation

messages.text: A quiet diner patron sat in a distant booth; no goal or relationship had been established for them.

pendingUserMessage: Will asks the unidentified patron whether they saw anyone draw chalk marks, but nothing establishes what the patron wants or why they are present.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: The patron remained seated and said nothing, and everyone moved on as though Will had not asked the question.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Keep the direct question consequential while preserving uncertainty about the patron's immediate want.
requiredBeats: The silence, refusal, or another supported response keeps Will's chalk-mark question active without assigning the patron a motive.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Discard the direct question without consequence.
Invent a motive, allegiance, fear, or plan for the patron.
